documentation.text: @notice Approve a spender to transfer tokens on your behalf
@notice Transfer tokens from one address to another (requires allowance)

devdoc.details: 6 decimals (same as real USDT). Includes an open faucet so any      address can mint test tokens. DO NOT deploy to mainnet.      Usage with TrustChain:        1. Deploy MockUSDT        2. Call CharityPlatform.setStablecoinAddress(mockUSDT.address)        3. Donors call mockUSDT.faucet(myAddress, 1000e6) to get 1000 mUSDT        4. Donors call mockUSDT.approve(charityPlatform.address, amount)        5. Donors call charityPlatform.donateStablecoin(campaignId, amount)
devdoc.title: MockUSDT

approve(address,uint256).notice: Approve a spender to transfer tokens on your behalf

faucet(address,uint256).notice: Mint test tokens to any address (open faucet — testing only)

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfer tokens from one address to another (requires allowance)

userdoc.notice: A local-only ERC-20 token that mimics Tether (USDT) for testing
